title: Yenda Thalaiyila Yenna Vekkala
overview: A young engineering graduate is just trying to settle down in life but things do not go well for him when an unfortunate occurrence happens. A mystical force is forcing him to do certain tasks. Failure to finish the tasks will result in his death.
